Title: Allows customers of a utility to call for an independent audit of the utility's records
Summary: Allows 100 of more current customers of a utility to demand that the public service commission perform an audit of a public utility that has knowingly failed or neglected to obey the law or comply with its legal obligations.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law, in relation to allowing customers of a utility to call for an independent audit of the utility's records
